entity.summary: Hyperliquid trading and market-deployment interface spanning HyperCore spot markets and HyperEVM decentralized exchanges, with permissionless listing, smart routing, analytics, liquidity access, and cross-ecosystem execution.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation expose listing, deployment, HyperCore Spot trading, HyperEVM DEX access, smart routing, analytics, liquidity pools, and integrated DEX execution. HEI uses hybrid because the same trading surface spans HyperCore order-book markets and HyperEVM decentralized exchanges.

evidence.title: Funnel official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes launch-app access and describes listing, deployment, HyperCore Spot and HyperEVM trading, smart routing, analytics, and cross-ecosystem execution.

evidence.title: Funnel documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes permissionless market listing, native Hyperliquid spot deployment, Funnel DEX swap and liquidity surfaces, smart routing, and the trading terminal across HyperCore and HyperEVM.

evidence.title: Funnel exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently preserves Funnel under the funnel.markets exchange domain.
